title: Toast Notification
purpose: Display an instant toast from incoming results.

configFields.description: Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.

notes: Configuration UI is not available yet; it runs with defaults.
